title: tocoyena longiflora
intro: Tocoyena longiflora, also known as the Yellow Bell or Yellow Trumpet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Tocoyena longiflora include reducing pain and discomfort, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Tocoyena longiflora is often prepared as a tea or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
